name: Vessel USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable
summary: The Vessel USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable is a robust, long-lasting charging solution engineered for reliable daily use.
description: The Vessel USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable is a robust, long-lasting charging solution engineered for reliable daily use. Designed to deliver steady power to compatible Vessel devices, this cable is ideal for customers who rely on traditional USB-A charging ports or legacy power setups. This cable is fully compatible with all Vessel devices equipped with a USB-C charging port. It works smoothly with USB-A wall adapters, standard computer ports, travel chargers, and most USB-A power sources. Keeps your device charged and ready.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Flexible PVC and thermoplastic blend for added durability
